title: Pelican Origins
description: More origins for the origins minecraft mod
body:
# Information

  5 new origins for the origins mod.
  
**_Pehkui and Origins NEEDED_**

_**I reccomend using fabric 1.19.2, as it is the version the mod was tested on. Certain features might not work in other versions/mod loaders**_

# Origins

<details>
<summary>Quadrian</summary>

- **Fourth Dimension**
   - You can phase into the fourth dimension with the primary action key. An inverted shader is applied.![The fourth dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f867af91e26cbc35acd20a2ce33ead994f26977_0.webp)
- **Side Step**
  - You can phase "through" blocks while in the fourth dimension. Visibility is limited inside blocks. Bedrock, obsidian and iron blocks are the expections. <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kqA-jz04Hpc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
- **Diffrent Plane**
  - You cant see entitys in the fourth dimension, and they cant see you
- **Intagible**
  - You are unable to interact with anything while in 4D (no placing, breaking or interacting)
- **4D stomach**
  - You are unable to eat anything of a lower quality than coated in gold (golden carrots and apples)
- **Re-Adjust**
  - The longer you stay in the fourth dimension the longer you will have the weakness effect upon returning
</details>

<details>
<summary>Flying Squirrel</summary>

- **Double Jump and Glide**
  - You are able to double jump and you can glide through the air
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lWTAJJHjHOA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- **Climbing**
  - You can climb on walls
- **Lands on feet**
  - You take no fall damage
- **Fragile**
  - You have less hp (7 hearts)
- **No fireworks**
  - You cannot use fireworks to propell yourself when gliding
- **Smol**
  - You are only 1 block tall![The flying squirrel is only one block high](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb01cd716716cdf3da37b2a61498140b3701b3c7.png)
- **Vegetarian**
  - You cannot eat meat
</details>

<details>
<summary>Super Soldier</summary>

- **Modify Crossbow**
  - You can tinker crossbows to reload faster
- **Superior**
  - You are stronger and faster than others (speed and strength). Wearing full iron armour impowers you further (speed II and strength II)
- **Tall**
  - You are taller than average humans (2.5 blocks tall)![A super soldier at 2.5 blocks tall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5e5036299472bd3f37f493e9f755c9c6dfce43.png)
- **Fast Metabolism**
  - You need more food than others
- **Purging**
  - Potions have no effects (positive or negative)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Fallen Angel</summary>

- **Terrifying**
  - Villagers refuse to trade with you
- **Fire Healing**
  - You have no natural regeneration, and heal only by standing in fire
- **Immune**
  - You are immune to fire and poison
- **Speedy**
  - You move with angelic speed
- **Many eyes**
  - You can see in the dark
- **Divine light**
  - You can heal those close to you
- **Tough skin**
  - You have natural armour
- **Invisibilty**
  - Can go invisible to observe the humans. Makes you more hungary
- **Pesketarian**
  - Cant eat meat(except fish)
- **Weak**
  - You do less damage and cant wear armour
- **Miracle**
  - You can walk on water
- **Never rest**
  - You can never sleep (you can still set your spawn)
- **Smaller**
  - You are slightly smaller than humans (1.75 blocks tall)
- **Peaceful**
  - You cannot attack passive mobs or any players
- **Flight**
  - You can slowly fly when there are no blocks between you and the sky (can help and hinder, as sprint jumping doesnt work)

### Showcase of fallen angel:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bMZQhU7roEc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sandtrout</summary>

- **Submerge**
  - You sink two blocks deep in sand, you can move around like normal and see above<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ObJIZk2P9KM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
- **Deep Down**
  - You are hidden and faster when in sand
- **Tough skin**
  - Your skin offers natural protection
- **No water**
  - Water is incredibly dangerous to you, and can kill you in seconds
- **Sand Adapted**
  - Your legs have adapted to sand and you move slower on land
- **Need heat**
  - You freeze in cold biomes![The player freezing as if in powedered snow, while in a cold biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91c2801630509058e2454622e313e5a5e35c7d57_0.webp)
- **Burst**
  - Erupt out of the ground, doing massive damage to anything nearby. Launches you into the air and plays a roaring sound effect<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F6HbSpemApk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</details>

If you are here from my fiverr, welcome, I hope you enjoy my work. If not, please enjoy anyway and if you ever want a custom origin made you know [where to find me](https://www.fiverr.com/warden_3d/create-a-custom-origin-for-minecraft)
